reviews.review_description: It’s a dueling game that will make you hate your friends and laugh at your emotions hehehehe just do it.

The game is really fun but is also really hard and unfair at times because you will be at a hard level but you will only have a little thing to kill the bosses. Over all you should still get the game because I guess the game is not made for me but instead you.

reviews.review_title: i cant get into a game
reviews.review_description: it took me to three flouting island with a target an to mortars with some weapons

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. The arena you mentioned is the training arena. To play in arenas against other players, you need to pull the levers located on your sides, such as the skull lever for the pirate arena. I hope I've been helpful to you. See you on the gaming arenas and have fun!
